---
title: "Teaching"
pagetitle: "Teaching — Hugo Trad"
description: "Courses taught and planned at Africa Business School (UM6P)."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/teaching">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/enseignement">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/teaching">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="../en/teaching.html" class="is-active">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/enseignement.html">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/teaching.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="research.html">Research</a>
      <a href="projects.html">Projects</a>
      <a href="teaching.html" class="is-active">Teaching</a>
      <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Teaching</h1>
    <p class="inner__lede">At the intersection of experimental methods, cognitive psychology, and organizational behaviour — at PhD, master, and executive levels.</p>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Active</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2026</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Experimental Methods</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">PhD · Africa Business School · UM6P</span>
            <p>Designing and running rigorous experiments in the social sciences.</p>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2018 —</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Behavioural Insights Applied to Organizations</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Delivered at ABS/UM6P, ENA (Chaire Innovation Publique), Sciences Po, CNAM, CentraleSupélec, IRA de Bastia, Croix-Rouge, Sup de Pub, Lab de Pôle Emploi</span>
            <p>Implementing evidence-based behavioural models in organizations.</p>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Planned</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">Jan 2027</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Mixed Methods · Research Methods</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Master · Africa Business School · UM6P</span>
            <p>Designing studies that combine qualitative and quantitative methods.</p>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2026–2027</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Human Behaviour and Performance in the Workplace</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">School of Hospitality Business &amp; Management · UM6P</span>
            <p>Behavioural science for hospitality and service-sector leaders.</p>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>
  </article>
</main>
```
